name: Animated Shiny Text
description: A text component with a shimmering shine animation that sweeps across the text, creating a metallic or glossy highlight effect.
whenToUse: Use for badges, announcements, CTAs, or any text element that should draw attention with a shine effect.

props.name: children
props.description: Text content to apply the shine effect to

props.name: shimmerWidth
props.description: Width of the shimmer effect in pixels
